parsed.production_notes: The video is a rapid montage of still images, many exhibiting AI-generation hallmarks like surreal compositions, unnatural textures, and distorted features (e.g., the skeletal mariachi).

characters.appearance: Various individuals appearing rapidly in sequence. Includes a mariachi, a woman, a skeleton, a masked person, and dancers.
characters.wardrobe: Diverse attire including mariachi suits, casual street clothes, leather jackets, and traditional Mexican dresses.
characters.demeanor: Ranges from stoic and mysterious to dynamic and expressive.

scenes.setting: Desert landscape, street kiosk, and abstract backgrounds.

panels.panel_visual_description: A rapid sequence of three still images. First, a black-and-white shot from behind of a person in a sombrero and mariachi suit in a desert. Second, a color photo of a dark-haired woman in a red crop top and jeans at a street kiosk. Third, a black-and-white image of a skeletal figure in an ornate mariachi outfit and sombrero.

scenes.visual_description: A fast-paced montage flashes on screen, showing a mariachi, a woman at a stall, and a skeletal figure. A constant text overlay sits in the center.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: No quise ser como el resto, ese es mi negocio, me puse a invertir. [I didn't want to be like the rest, that's my business, I started to invest.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
"you'll never be bilingual"
me 2.5 months after switching from duolingo to speak

scenes.setting: Marketplace, dark studio, and a room with a motorcycle.

panels.panel_visual_description: The sequence of still images continues. It shows colorful star-shaped piñatas hanging in a market. Then, a black-and-white image of a seated person with their face hidden by a woven hat. Next, a color image of a person in a red mask and black leather jacket holding a potted cactus near a motorcycle. Finally, a black-and-white image of a dancer in a flowing traditional dress mid-twirl.

scenes.visual_description: The montage continues with piñatas, a hidden face, a masked person with a cactus, and a twirling dancer. The central text overlay remains constant.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: También tuve mis tropiezos, [I also had my stumbling blocks,]
scenes.on_screen_text:
"you'll never be bilingual"
me 2.5 months after switching from duolingo to speak

panels.panel_visual_description: The sequence concludes with two images. First, a color photograph of a dancer in a voluminous white and red traditional dress twirling in an outdoor arena. Second, a black-and-white portrait of a man in a sombrero aiming a revolver directly at the camera.

scenes.visual_description: The final images show a dancer twirling outdoors and a man pointing a gun. The text overlay persists until the end.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: pero el que empieza también tiene fin. [but he who begins also has an end.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
"you'll never be bilingual"
me 2.5 months after switching from duolingo to speak
